daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is rewinding you that authenticity hits different—lean into what makes you uniquely you today and watch how people gravitate toward that energy.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the glow-up. Whether you're coupled or single, there's a tender moment brewing that asks you to be a lil vulnerable. Risk it—connection lives on the other side of that leap.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. That thing you've been sitting on? The universe is nudging you to speak up. Your perspective matters more than you think rn.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Moving with intention—whether that's a walk, stretching, or just being still—will reset your nervous system. Listen to what feels good, not what feels like punishment.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are giving you clarity this week, Sag. You're shedding what no longer serves and stepping into your power. Trust the timing—even the slow moments are building something real.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings, but the real magic is in being authentically you. Whether single or coupled, your vibe is magnetic rn. Don't overthink it—just show up as you are.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked. This is the week to pitch that idea or pivot toward something that actually fulfills you. The universe is backing your boldness, so lean in.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and rest in equal measure. Find joy in how your physical self feels rather than chasing goals. Dance, walk, breathe—simple rituals hit different right now.
